Closes: <!-- TICKET-123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feature/` — new behaviour
- [ ] `bug/` — fixes a defect
- [ ] `hotfix/` — urgent production fix
- [ ] docs / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is named `feature/<ticket>-<slug>`, `bug/<ticket>-<slug>` or `hotfix/<ticket>-<slug>`.
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
- [ ] New public functions ship with at least one **property test** (Hypothesis).
- [ ] `ruff`, `black --check`, `mypy` all pass locally.
- [ ] `pytest` is green locally (smoke + property tests).
- [ ] Docs updated (`docs/`) where behaviour changed.
- [ ] **Build / Test / Validate** checks are green.

<!-- Anything that needs special attention, trade-offs, follow-ups. -->
